TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Mayl‚Äôux, title = Mayl‚Äôux, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mayl‚Äôux} }

S.FORM: alang Mayl'ux ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 62 buwan, 143 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 89% kyan ku 127 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 11% kyan ku 16 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 72%, saySiyat 12%, Amis 3%, Bunun 1%, Truku 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Mayl'ux hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Mayl'ux hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Mayl'ux hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Mayl'ux hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Mayl'ux hya' ga Mayhuman. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Mayl'ux ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 62 buwan, 143 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 89% kyan ku 127 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 11% kyan ku 16 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 72%, saySiyat 12%, Amis 3%, Bunun 1%, Truku 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Mayl'ux hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Mayl'ux hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Mayl'ux hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Mayl'ux hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Mayl'ux hya' ga Mayhuman. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč majl Ēux …£a nija mki s~…ēku s~…ēin ¶~ ®ik keŇč atu …£pńßo …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, tajan **%, s~…ēajs~…ēijat **%, amis~…ē *%, ő≤unun *%, truku *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na majl Ēux ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj Ēzil na majl Ēux ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na majl Ēux ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na majl Ēux ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na majl Ēux ńßja Ē …£a majńßuman. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
